abilities.name: Shady Move
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Typhlosion is your Active Pokemon, you may move 1 damage counter from either player's Pokemon to another Pokemon (yours or your opponent's). This power can't be used if Typhlosion is affected by a Special Condition.

tests.name: shady_move_moves_damage
tests.description: Test that Shady Move can move damage counters between Pokemon

tests.name: shady_move_effect_id
tests.description: Test that effect ID is correctly formatted
